goal: Bring up the Isaac Sim ROS2 bridge for a Franka Panda arm: publish joint states on /joint_states at 60 Hz, subscribe joint position commands on /joint_commands, synchronize the simulation clock on /clock via configure_ros2_time. Verify the bridge is live by calling ros2_list_topics and confirming all three topics are active, then ros2_subscribe_once on /joint_states and checking the 7 joint names are present. Exercises Phase 10 setup_ros2_bridge + configure_ros2_time + emit_ros2_control_yaml end-to-end with no motion planner — pure ROS2 middleware integration.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-ros2-bridge-franka:

1) Bridge scope: The canonical targets the most common ROS2 bridge bring-up pattern — Franka arm publishing joint states for MoveIt2 / Nav2 consumers while accepting joint position commands. This maps directly to backlog entry ros2-bridge-setup-franka-001 (tier 1, no blockers).

2) Topic layout:
   - /joint_states  → sensor_msgs/JointState published from Isaac Sim articulation at 60 Hz.
   - /joint_commands → sensor_msgs/JointState subscribed by Isaac Sim; positions written to drive targets.
   - /clock          → rosgraph_msgs/Clock; configure_ros2_time(use_sim_time=True) enables /clock.
   ROS2 standard: joint_names must match URDF link names exactly. Franka URDF joint names: panda_joint1..panda_joint7.

3) emit_ros2_control_yaml: Generates the ros2_control hardware-interface description YAML that downstream MoveIt2 or ros2_control node needs to load the compat layer. Not strictly required for bridge validation but completes the bring-up story and is low-cost.

4) Validation strategy: ros2_list_topics returns the set of active topics after bridge start. ros2_subscribe_once /joint_states confirms we can receive one JointState message with 7 joint names present. diagnose_ros2 as the final plumbing health check. No cube delivery — this is a bridge-validation canonical, not a motion canonical.

5) Physics config: CPU dynamics, no GPU — bridge validation does not require GPU physics. Franka is mounted at [0, 0, 0.75] on a 0.75 m table. No conveyor, no workpieces needed.

6) settle_state: The bridge has no physical settle to wait for; the settle_state captures the expected initial joint configuration (home pose) and confirms the bridge is up within 2s.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot mount table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics — bridge validation does not need GPU physics ───────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda arm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mounted at z=0.75 (table top). robot_wizard loads the USD + registers
# articulation so the bridge can discover joint names automatically.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── ROS2 sim clock ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Must be configured BEFORE bridge start so downstream nodes receive /clock
# from t=0. use_sim_time=True publishes rosgraph_msgs/Clock.
configure_ros2_time(
    mode="sim_time",
)

# ── ROS2 bridge: joint_states publisher + joint_commands subscriber ───────────
# profile="franka_moveit2" wires joint_states publisher + joint_commands
# subscriber + TF + ROS2 clock node in one call (Phase 10 single-call API).
setup_ros2_bridge(
    profile="franka_moveit2",
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
)

# ── Emit ros2_control hardware interface YAML ────────────────────────────────
# Produces the ros2_control <robot> YAML block needed by MoveIt2 and
# ros2_control node. Written to /tmp/franka_ros2_control.yaml by default.
# controller_type selects the hardware plugin category.
emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    output_path="/tmp/franka_ros2_control.yaml",
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
    joint_states_topic="/joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=100,
)

# ── Bridge validation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. List all active ROS2 topics — confirm /joint_states, /joint_commands,
#    and /clock are present after bridge startup.
active_topics = ros2_list_topics()
expected_topics = {"/joint_states", "/joint_commands", "/clock"}
missing = expected_topics - set(active_topics)
if missing:
    raise RuntimeError(f"ROS2 bridge validation failed: missing topics {missing}")

# 2. Subscribe once to /joint_states and verify 7 Franka joint names are present.
# Timeout 5.0s: bridge typically delivers first message within 0.1s.
joint_msg = ros2_subscribe_once(topic="/joint_states", msg_type="sensor_msgs/msg/JointState", timeout=5.0)
franka_joints = [
    "panda_joint1", "panda_joint2", "panda_joint3", "panda_joint4",
    "panda_joint5", "panda_joint6", "panda_joint7",
]
msg_names = set(joint_msg.get("name", []))
missing_joints = [j for j in franka_joints if j not in msg_names]
if missing_joints:
    raise RuntimeError(f"JointState message missing joints: {missing_joints}")

# 3. Full plumbing health check.
diagnose_ros2()
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16-patched-r-a-fix-2; form-gate ⏳ (schema-OK after 2 patch rounds); function-gate ⏳
failure_modes: ROS2 environment not sourced / rclpy not importable — setup_ros2_bridge raises ImportError; check 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash' before launching Kit
ROS2 daemon not running — ros2_list_topics returns empty list; restart with 'ros2 daemon start'
robot_wizard fails to load Franka USD (Nucleus path not mounted) — bridge has no articulation to discover joints from; joint_states topic publishes 0 joints
configure_ros2_time called after setup_ros2_bridge — /clock messages arrive with timestamp=0 for first N messages; always call configure_ros2_time first
QoS mismatch: bridge publishes RELIABLE, subscriber expects BEST_EFFORT — message not received; check diagnose_ros2 qos_warnings field
emit_ros2_control_yaml output_path not writable — YAML not written but bridge still functions; downstream MoveIt2 will not load the controller
extension_notes: First ros2-bridge-category canonical in the CP-NEW series. Covers the base bring-up pattern: single-arm joint-state/command ROS2 bridge with sim-clock sync and ros2_control YAML emission. No motion planner involved — pure middleware integration. Pairs with ros2-moveit2-franka-001 (future) which adds MoveIt2 planning on top of this bring-up.
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

configure_ros2_time(
    mode="sim_time",
)

setup_ros2_bridge(
    profile="franka_moveit2",
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
)

emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    output_path="/tmp/franka_ros2_control.yaml",
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
    joint_states_topic="/joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=100,
)

active_topics = ros2_list_topics()
expected_topics = {"/joint_states", "/joint_commands", "/clock"}
missing = expected_topics - set(active_topics)
if missing:
    raise RuntimeError(f"ROS2 bridge validation failed: missing topics {missing}")

joint_msg = ros2_subscribe_once(topic="/joint_states", msg_type="sensor_msgs/msg/JointState", timeout=5.0)
franka_joints = [
    "panda_joint1", "panda_joint2", "panda_joint3", "panda_joint4",
    "panda_joint5", "panda_joint6", "panda_joint7",
]
msg_names = set(joint_msg.get("name", []))
missing_joints = [j for j in franka_joints if j not in msg_names]
if missing_joints:
    raise RuntimeError(f"JointState message missing joints: {missing_joints}")

diagnose_ros2(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    expected_topics=["/joint_states", "/joint_commands", "/clock"],
    check_qos=True,
)
